title: Linociera brachystachys
taxonomy: Linociera brachystachys is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the genus Linociera, which is a part of the Sapindales order. The plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Cameroon, Republic of the Congo, and Democratic Republic of the Congo. Linociera brachystachys is classified as an evergreen tree or shrub, and its classification is further supported by its characteristics and morphology. The plant's classification is essential for understanding its ecological role and potential uses in the region.
